items.title: 럭셔리 코스메틱 에셋 매핑
items.prompt: A close-up macro shot of @skincare_bottle. The dropper slowly dispenses a crystalline drop that falls into a serene, concentric pool of lavender-tinted water below.
items.camera: Ultra macro, slow motion (120fps), smooth vertical tilt down.
items.lighting: Soft, warm, diffused morning sunlight, minimalist clean aesthetic, volumetric studio lighting.

items.title: 스마트 테크 에셋 융합
items.prompt: High-tech commercial showcasing @smartwatch. Elegant glowing cyan and magenta circuitry patterns race along the metallic bezel and seamlessly integrate with the dynamic, shifting digital watch face.
items.camera: Dolly zoom, extreme close-up, rotating lens.
items.lighting: Cyberpunk aesthetic, sharp laser reflections, high contrast, glossy dark reflective surface.

items.title: 프리미엄 슈즈 역동적 모션
items.prompt: Tracking shot following @running_shoe as it makes hard impact on wet, dark asphalt. Splashes of neon-orange glowing rain droplets spray outward in gravity-defying slow motion.
items.camera: Ground-level tracking shot, high speed, dynamic motion blur.
items.lighting: Moody cinematic, dramatic backlighting, wet reflective floor.

items.title: 글라스 향수병 액체 시뮬레이션
items.prompt: The glass bottle of @perfume floating weightlessly in a zero-gravity environment. Beautiful swirls of liquid rose gold and delicate pink silk ribbons wrap around the body of the bottle.
items.camera: Slow orbital camera movement, shallow depth of field.
items.lighting: High-fashion luxury look, soft-focus bokeh, ethereal backlighting.

items.title: 수제 패티 조립 & 모션
items.prompt: High-speed culinary disassembly sequence. The ingredients of @gourmet_burger (glowing melted cheddar, hot sizzling beef patty, crisp lettuce, red tomato slice) float and align perfectly in mid-air.
items.camera: Slow-motion vertical rise, camera tracking the falling top bun.
items.lighting: Rich warm colors, professional food styling lighting, high-contrast dark background.

items.title: 스파클링 캔 크랙 & 버스트
items.prompt: A cold aluminum can of @beverage opening in super slow motion. A violent, beautiful geyser of sparkling lime-green soda and tiny, crystalline ice particles erupts upward, catching the light.
items.camera: Extreme close-up on the pull-tab, fast zoom-out.
items.lighting: High frame-rate capture, bright daylight, hyper-detailed condensation droplets on the can.

items.title: 스시 브러시 텍스처
items.prompt: A professional chef’s hand brushing a glossy, dark soy sauce glaze onto the fresh slice of @tuna_sushi. The sauce leaves a wet, glistening trail that reflects the ambient warmth.
items.camera: Macro lens, static side angle, deep focus on the fish texture.
items.lighting: Minimalist Japanese aesthetic, soft directional key light, clean slate background.

items.title: 디저트 크림 카스케이드
items.prompt: Creamy, vibrant green matcha sauce cascading smoothly down the sides of a fluffy, wobbling @pancake_souffle. The pancake gently bounces as the thick cream pools around its base.
items.camera: 45-degree angle medium shot, high frame-rate slow motion.
items.lighting: Cozy cafe lighting, soft shadows, pastel color palette.

items.title: 미스터리 누아르 추적
items.prompt: A suspenseful sequence following @hero_detective as he walks down a rain-slicked, dark neon alley. Steam rises from the wet pavement while shadows stretch dramatically behind him.
items.camera: Low-angle tracking shot, anamorphic lens, slight handheld camera shake.
items.lighting: 1950s cinematic film noir, high-contrast chiaroscuro, flickering green and magenta neon signs.

items.title: 아날로그 청춘 감성
items.prompt: Nostalgic VHS-style shot of @main_girl riding a vintage bicycle down an empty suburban street. Warm golden hour sunlight flares into the lens, casting long glowing shadows.
items.camera: Side tracking shot, vintage anamorphic look, soft light leaks.
items.lighting: Faded 1980s color grading, warm retro nostalgia, subtle chromatic aberration.

items.title: SF 디스토피아 우주 비행
items.prompt: Epic sci-fi scene inside a spacesuit. A close-up of @astronaut_me inside the helmet, looking out as a massive, glowing ringed planet reflects perfectly on the gold-tinted visor.
items.camera: Slow push-in on the visor, rotating reflection overlay.
items.lighting: Moody interior cabin lights (cyan/red), cold cosmic dark, epic cinematic scale.

items.title: 사이버펑크 해커 오피스
items.prompt: Medium shot of @cyber_hacker typing frantically in a dark room. Holographic interface screens float around them, reflecting bright neon blue data paths across their face.
items.camera: Cybernetic slow pan, high-tech camera movement.
items.lighting: Dimly lit environment, high-contrast glow, modern sci-fi look.

items.title: F1 스피드 머신 트랙
items.prompt: A sleek F1 racing car blasting past the camera on a rain-drenched racetrack. A massive, dramatic spray of water mist and bright red tail-light sparks fly off the wet rear wing.
items.camera: Ground-level whip pan, dramatic motion blur, high-speed camera shake.
items.lighting: Rainy night race, high-speed shutter look, intense lens flares.

items.title: 슬램덩크 공중 슬로모션
items.prompt: A professional basketball player leaping high toward the rim. The player dunks the ball hard, causing the backboard glass to vibrate with visible shockwaves as sweat droplets scatter.
items.camera: Low-angle heroic tracking shot, time-slice slow motion.
items.lighting: Intense stadium spotlight, gritty texture, high-contrast shadows.

items.title: 파도 터널 속의 서퍼
items.prompt: A surfer riding inside a massive, hollow turquoise wave barrel. Sunlight cuts through the translucent water wall, creating a glowing tunnel of sea foam and mist.
items.camera: High-adrenaline FPV tracking shot inside the wave barrel.
items.lighting: High-contrast summer sun, deep turquoise water color, hyper-detailed spray texture.

items.title: 무한 루프 커피 가르기
items.prompt: Seamless perfect loop. Rich espresso pouring into a glass of cold milk, blooming into intricate cloud-like cream swirls. As the liquid reaches the brim, the camera pans down smoothly to reveal an empty glass starting the cycle again.
items.camera: Seamless vertical panning loop, stabilized camera tracking.
items.lighting: Warm lofi cafe atmosphere, aesthetic soft-focus bokeh.

items.title: 실시간 의상 트랜지션
items.prompt: A person walking confidently toward the camera wearing casual attire. In one seamless stride, their outfit instantly morphs into a dazzling, glowing high-fashion neon suit.
items.camera: Steady tracking shot, seamless jump-cut transition.
items.lighting: Street style, moody urban backdrop with blinking shop lights.

items.title: 아이패드 마법 팝업
items.prompt: A hand tapping the screen of an iPad showing a 3D line-art drawing of @cute_puppy. Instantly, the drawn puppy comes to life, popping out of the screen as a real, fluffy golden retriever puppy.
items.camera: Top-down close-up shot, fast zoom in.
items.lighting: Bright creative desk setup, cozy wooden textures, magical volumetric sparkles.
